default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on FOSSA's content strategy, focusing on registry pages, CVE content, and programmatic SEO opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Registry page development is paused due to technical challenges and traffic quality concerns](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Shifting focus to CVE (Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures) pages as a more contained experiment](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO options using public data sources for CVE content](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Continuing work on CWE (Common Weakness Enumeration) articles while planning next steps](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Topics

### Website Architecture and CMS Challenges

  - [FOSSA's website uses a GitHub repo with static files, making content management complex](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Even engineers struggle to understand the setup, causing delays in content updates (e.g., CW series)](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [The complexity impacts the ability to quickly implement new content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### Registry Page Development

  - [Progress has been limited in recent weeks](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Concerns raised about traffic quality generated by registry pages](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Competitive analysis shows mixed results: high traffic but potentially low quality for some competitors](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Decision made to pause further registry-related progress for now](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### CVE Pages as Alternative Focus

  - [Proposed as a more contained experiment compared to registry pages](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Less risk of content cannibalization as CVEs are somewhat independent of package names](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Potential to use public data sources, making implementation easier](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [Could be embedded within package pages for cross-referencing](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

### Programmatic SEO Opportunities

  - [Exploring options to create CVE pages using public data sources](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [GrowthX has engineering resources to potentially build programmatic SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Need to identify additional public data sources to create comprehensive CVE pages](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Opportunity for internal linking between CVEs, CWEs, and registry content](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Content Creation and Backlog

  - [Continuing work on CWE articles to build content backlog](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Considering alternative content types (glossary posts, comparisons) if technical bottlenecks persist](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Balancing priorities between PSEO development and maintaining content production](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andy to provide final green light on CVE page development after researching additional data sources](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Aida to continue working on CWE articles](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Jakub to explore public data sources for CVE content and assess programmatic SEO possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Team to keep in contact over the next few days to finalize plans](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Maintain flexibility in meeting schedule due to Jakub's upcoming vacation](https://fathom.video/share/M6rssTKNTZkVDxuGxJExVEc8rFHso-wL?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)

action_items.description: Research additional public sources for CVE data beyond CVE Program
Provide final confirmation on proceeding with CVE pages
Check existing public data sources for CVE information
